codeReview.summary: Implementation in src/middleware.ts matches the feature contract: all listed protected routes (and subpaths) require a dispatch-token cookie and redirect to /login with 307 when absent; /login redirects authenticated users to /dashboard with 307; existing x-pathname request-header forwarding logic remains in place for pass-through requests.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, mission AGENTS.md, services.yaml, and library docs. No blocking or non-blocking defects were found for this feature; implementation satisfies the described behavior.
